text:
Instrument #20260174
Page 2 of 8

A description of a parcel, being part of the SE% of the NE% and the NE% of
the SE% of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range 18 West, Marion County,
Mississippi, lying East of Bunkerhill Road and South of Sinclair Road, being
specifically described as follows, to wit:

Commencing at a Cotton Picker Spindle Found at the Northeast Corner of the
SE% of the NE% of Section 4, and thence run along the East line of said SE%
the following calls: thence run South 02 degrees 06 minutes 04 seconds East
a distance of 18.59 feet to an iron pin with cap found; thence continue South
02 degrees 06 minutes 04 seconds East a distance of 195.28 feet to an iron
pin with cap found and the Point of Beginning: Thence continue along the
East line of said SE%, South 02 degrees 06 minutes 04 seconds East a
distance of 1,114.64 feet to a fence corner found at the Southeast corner of
the SE% of the NE; thence run along the East line of the NE% of the SE%
South 02 degrees 04 minutes 56 seconds East a distance of 945.63 feet to an
iron pin set with cap stamped S-34977 at the intersection of said East line
with the East right of way line of Bunkerhill Road; thence run along said East
right of way line the following 6 calls along a curve to the right having a
radius of 4,826.75 feet, length of 487.85 feet, chord bearing of North 37
degrees 01 minutes 05 seconds West and chord distance of 487 64 feet to an
iron pin with cap stamped S-34977 along a curve to the right having a radius
of 2,981.36 feet, length of 391.21 feet, chord bearing of North 31 degrees 55
minutes 49 seconds West and a chord distance of 390.93 feet to an iron pin
with cap stamped S-34977, North 26 degrees 32 minutes 22 seconds West a
distance of 300.08 feet to an iron pin with cap stamped S-34977, along a
curve to the right having a radius of 1,892.19 feet, length of 604.14 feet,
chord bearing of North 20 degrees 37 minutes 39 seconds West and a chord
distance of 601.58 feet to an iron pin set with cap stamped S-34977, North
09 degrees 10 minutes 26 seconds West a distance of 546.54 feet to an iron
pin set with cap stamped S-34977, North 06 40 minutes 09 seconds West a
distance of 173.93 feet to the intersection of said East right of way line with
the South right of way line of Sinclair Road; thence run along said South
right of way line the following 3 calls: South 89 degrees 26 minutes 58
seconds East a distance of 188.71 feet to an iron pin set with cap stamped
S-34977; North 89 degrees 36 minutes 20 seconds East a distance of 307.70
feet to an iron pin with cap stamped S-34977; North 89 degrees 14 minutes
42 seconds East a distance of 166.61 feet to an iron pin with cap found;
thence leaving said South right of way line run South 00 degrees 32 minutes
47 seconds East a distance of 208.54 feet to an iron pin with cap found;
thence run North 89 degrees 59 minutes 27 seconds East a distance of 213.48
feet and back to the Point of Beginning.
